content.text:
I don’t have live weather data right now. If you tell me your location and what you need, I can help you with it. A few quick questions:

- What city and country are you in?
- Do you want current conditions, an hourly forecast, or a 7-day forecast?
- Is there a specific date/time you’re planning for?

If you’d rather check yourself in the meantime, you can:
- On your phone: open your weather app and search your city (enable location for automatic updates).
- On the web: go to a weather site and enter your city (or just search “weather [city]” in your browser).
